name: U.D.Electronic Corp.
summary: U.D. Electronic Corp. manufactures and sells electronic components worldwide. Its products include RJ45 ICM connectors, pure connectors, LAN filters, and I/O connectors, consumer cables, surge protection devices, audio modules and dongles, and USB to RJ45 dongles, as well as automotive electronics, such as common mode filters and USB connectors. The company offers its products under the UDEJack trademark for the telecommunications, data communications, computer, industrial, and medical markets. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
